title: Add Topper Ignite logo image to navbar and footer

requirements.text: Save the uploaded Topper Ignite logo (download-1.webp) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png and use it as the logo image in the Navbar component, replacing any existing placeholder or SVG logo.
acceptanceCriteria: The Topper Ignite logo image (TG circular fire design) is visible in the Navbar on desktop and mobile views.
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png.
The logo in the Navbar links to or scrolls to the top of the page.
No broken image or missing asset errors appear in the browser console.

requirements.text: Use the same Topper Ignite logo image in the Footer component's brand logo area, replacing any existing placeholder or SVG logo there.
acceptanceCriteria: The Topper Ignite logo image is visible in the Footer brand section.
The logo renders at an appropriate size consistent with the footer layout.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Do not alter the overall layout or styling of Navbar or Footer beyond replacing the logo element.
nonGoals: Redesigning the Navbar or Footer layout.
Adding new navigation links or sections.

edits: Convert the uploaded logo to a clean circular PNG with transparent background, preserving the TG fire design and 'TOPPER IGNITE' text (download-1.webp > topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png)
